data.content:
I can see you have an MSTest project with a failing test — `CalculateShipping_ExpressDelivery_Returns15` expects `15.00` but the method returns `10.00` for express.

Let me start `dotnet watch test` so tests re-run automatically on file changes:

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Start dotnet watch test for hot reload

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Start dotnet watch test for hot reload

data.reasoningText:
The user has a .NET MSTest project. They want hot reload / watch mode for tests. I can set this up with `dotnet watch test`. Let me start it up.

First, let me do a quick `dotnet test` to see which tests are failing, and then start `dotnet watch test` for hot reload.
